# Chapter 2: Advanced Features

## Callouts

::: {.callout-note}
This is a callout note. It helps highlight important information.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## Pro Tip
Use callouts to make your content more engaging!
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
Be careful when using complex features - test thoroughly!
:::

## Columns Layout

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Left Column
Content on the left side.
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Right Column
Content on the right side.
:::

::::

## Incremental Lists

In RevealJS format, you can reveal list items one at a time:

::: {.incremental}
- First item
- Second item  
- Third item
:::

## Fragments

::: {.fragment}
This text will appear as a fragment in RevealJS.
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
This will fade in.
:::
